name: Bitter Melon
summary: Bitter melon is best framed around blood-glucose and metabolic-health research, with conservative evidence language and safety screening for diabetes medications, hypoglycemia risk, pregnancy, and perioperative use.
description: Bitter melon is best framed around blood-glucose and metabolic-health research, with conservative evidence language and safety screening for diabetes medications, hypoglycemia risk, pregnancy, and perioperative use.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Complementary and alternative medicine for glycemic control of diabetes mellitus: A systematic review
Hypoglycemic efficacy and safety of Momordica charantia (bitter melon) in patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus
